title: 6800mAh Li-ion Battery Compatible with Xiaomi Roborock S5 S4 S6 S7 S8 S50 S51 S52 S55 S502 S5 Max, Xiaowa E20 E25 E35, Battery for Xiaomi Mijia 1st and 2nd Generation, Mi Robot Vacuum Cleaner Battery
features: 【Compatible models】Compatible with Roborock S4, S5, S50, S6, S7, S4 Max, S5 Max, S7 Max, E4, E5, E20, E25, E35, E201 robot vacuum cleaner, Compatible with the Xiaomi Robot Vacuum series of the 1st/2nd generation.

【High-performance & Easy installation】It uses lithium-ion batteries, which offer higher energy density, better performance, and a longer lifespan. Installation is very simple, and replacing the battery only takes a few minutes. First, loosen the screw at the bottom, disconnect the battery connector, and then insert the new battery.

【Reliable and certified】Rest assured with our CE-certified, FCC-certified, and ROHS-certified replacement batteries, which feature advanced lithium electronic technology for safer and more comprehensive protection. Strict compatibility guidelines and quality control standards.

【High customer service】We offer friendly customer service around the clock. If you have any questions, please contact us via Amazon message, and we'll offer you a 30-day refund or exchange. The battery is covered for 12 months.
description: Product Description About OPAHUTER: OPAHUTER products are made of high-quality materials. All OPAHUTER products are certified by UL / CE / FCC for safety. Every one of our replacement sweeper and air vacuum cleaner tool batteries are tested to meet specifications. As a professional manufacturer of sweeper and air vacuum cleaner tool batteries, OPAHUTER focuses on designing and manufacturing a variety of high-quality power tool batteries. OPAHUTER always adheres to eco-packaging friendly packaging, using carton packaging without any plastic, reflecting the concept of simplicity. Built in multiple protections against overload, over-voltage, over-current, short circuit and internal overheating. Compatible devices Compatible with Roborock S4, S5, S50, S6, S7, S4 Max, S5 Max, S7 Max, E4, E5, E20, E25, E35, E201 robot vacuum cleaners, Compatible with der Xiaomi Robot Vacuum-Serie der 1./2. Generation. How to use batteries efficiently？ Please fully charge the battery before using it for the first time. If you will not be using the battery for a long time, please charge it every three months to extend the life of the battery. It is recommended to store the battery in a dry environment. Do not charge the battery continue over 24 hour. Please store it in a dry, clean, cool, away from heat and metal objects, do not keep it fully charged or discharged for a long time. When the battery is unused for a long time, we recommend using the battery at least once every two to three weeks.
